name: AgentOps RPI Behavior Canary
description: Offline public canary for RPI phased runner contracts and deterministic runtime boundaries.

cases.title: RPI runtime source files are present
cases.objective: Verify the RPI behavior canary resolves repo-root source paths from the suite directory.

inputs.shell: test -f cli/cmd/ao/rpi_phased.go && test -f cli/cmd/ao/rpi_serve.go && test -f skills/rpi/SKILL.md

cases.title: phased runner exposes bounded runtime modes
cases.objective: Ensure RPI phased execution keeps explicit runtime-mode and runtime-command contracts.

expectations.value: Run RPI with fresh runtime session per phase
Runtime command used for phase prompts

cases.title: RPI serve preserves runtime orchestration flags
cases.objective: Cover the serve entrypoint used for RPI orchestration without invoking a live runtime.

expectations.value: Runtime command for orchestration phase prompts

cases.title: eval runner keeps live adapters advisory
cases.objective: Protect deterministic public canaries from live Claude or Codex execution.

expectations.value: Live Claude and Codex adapters are evaluated by a later runtime tier.
runtime %q is out of deterministic scope

cases.title: RPI skill contract remains available
cases.objective: Ensure RPI behavior canaries are anchored to the user-facing skill contract.
